reason: FIPS mode must be enabled at installation time with a kernel boot parameter. Enabling it post-installation is not supported and could make the system unbootable.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; FIPS mode requires installation-time configuration; Post-installation FIPS enablement is explicitly unsupported; Risk of system becoming unbootable if misconfigured; Affects core cryptographic subsystems; Requires initramfs/dracut modifications
